CHUN, INDICATING THAT SHE WAS OUT OF TOWN. THE COURT ISSUES AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL, MS. CHUN, SHOULD NOT BE HELD IN CONTEMPT FOR FAILING TO APPEAR IN THIS DEPARTMENT ON TWO DATES, 11/14/06 AND 11/27/06 (TODAY). OSC SET FOR HEARING ON 12/12/06 AT 10:15AM. THE COURT SETS BAIL AT $5,000.00 AND ISSUES AND STAYS BODY ATTACHMENT. THE COURT ALSO CONTINUES THIS MOTION TO 12/12/06 TO BE HEARD TOGETHER WITH THE OSC. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO DRAFT ORDER. MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Partition of Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: Yuen Lai, appearance is waived.
Witness: Yenn Lai, is also present in court.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court grants an Interlocutory Judgment, signed in open court.
See scanned doc. for details of Judgment.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Mar-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Partition of Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: Yuen Lai, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Laurie Yam,
and Witness: Yenn Lai.
Plaintiff, Interpreter and Witness were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court continued the matter to Mar. 1, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Order for an appointment of the Referee, any information related to the commission, outline and scope of the Referee, etc., and Interlocutory Judgment.

Osc Re Contempt - Terrie Chun
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order To Show Cause Re Contempt As To Terrie Chun.
APPEARANCE: Cindy Lee, Esq. of Feng & Lee 885-5800 for pltf; Terrie Chun, Esq. of Law Offices of Terrie Chun and Associates 408/245-0542 or 650/578-1876 deft's counsel.
RULING: Court finds Ms. Chun in contempt and imposes a fine of $1,000 which is reportable to the State Bar and awards reasonable attorney fees to plaintiff. $1,000 fine to be paid to the Court. Plaintiff to submit a proposed order to include blank lines for the Court's determination on the amount of attorney fees to be awarded to plaintiff as well as the due date for the fine. (302/REQ/PB) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

Motion To Set Aside Pltf'S Request To Enter Default
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Dec-12-06 At 10:15 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT LOWE'S Motion To Set Aside Plaintiff's Request To Enter Default Based On Improper Service Of Process.
APPEARANCE: Cindy Lee, Esq. of Feng & Lee 885-5800 for pltf & opposing party; deft & moving party Robert Lowe also present without his atty Terrie Chun, Esq. of A Law Solution 650/578-1876.
RULING: Defendant was present without his attorney, Ms. Chun, indicating that she was out of town. The Court issues an order to show cause why defendant's counsel, Ms. Chun, should not be held in contempt for failing to appear in this department on two dates, 11/14/06 and 11/27/06 (today). OSC set for hearing on 12/12/06 at 10:15am. The Court sets bail at $5,000.00 and issues and stays body attachment. The Court also continues this motion to 12/12/06 to be heard together with the OSC. Plaintiff's counsel to draft order. (302/REQ/PB) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Peppina Thompson, CSR #7433

Motion To Set Aside Pltf'S Request To Enter Default
